item.title: PARALLAX, Session 7: The Motel
item.description: Session 7 of the campaign PARALLAX for Delta Green, where another victim of the tatto is met.

item.title: PARALLAX, Session 6: The Green Box
item.description: Session 6 of the campaign PARALLAX for Delta Green, where a party is formed.

item.title: PARALLAX, Session 5: Twin Suns
item.description: Session 5 of the campaign PARALLAX for Delta Green, where things get moving before Lawrence is contacted again.

item.title: PARALLAX, Session 4: Contact
item.description: Session 4 of the campaign PARALLAX for Delta Green, where Lawrence gets an interesting briefing.

item.title: PARALLAX, Session 3: The Bag
item.description: Session 3 of the campaign PARALLAX for Delta Green, where Lawrence makes a choice.

item.title: PARALLAX, Session 2: Pariah
item.description: Session 2 of the campaign PARALLAX for Delta Green, where Lawrence’s vision of the world is shaken to the core.

item.title: PARALLAX, Session 1: The po-boy
item.description: Session 1 of the campaign PARALLAX for Delta Green, where Lawrence gets some work to do.

item.title: PARALLAX, Session 0: Main character creation
item.description: Session 0 for the Delta Green campaign PARALLAX, where we meet the main character, Lawrence Bartolini

item.title: A Study in Dust and Stone, Session 8: The tome
item.description: Session 9 of the scenario “A study in Dust and Stone” for Call of Cthulhu 7th ed, where Lorenzo takes a peek at forbidden knowledge

item.title: A Study in Dust and Stone, Session 8: the Krarken's Lair
item.description: Session 8 of the scenario “A study in Dust and Stone” for Call of Cthulhu 7th ed, where Lorenzo and Remy face the cult of Summanus.

item.title: A Study in Dust and Stone, Session 7: Jazz night
item.description: Session 7 of the scenario “A study in Dust and Stone” for Call of Cthulhu 7th ed, where Lorenzo and Remy head for the lair of the Kraken.

item.title: A Study in Dust and Stone, Session 6: Ancient gods
item.description: Session 6 of the scenario “A study in Dust and Stone” for Call of Cthulhu 7th ed, where some light is shed upon the situation

item.title: A Study in Dust and Stone, Session 5: Under a Tuscan sun
item.description: Session 5 of the scenario “A study in Dust and Stone” for Call of Cthulhu 7th ed, where the investigation takes a Tuscan turn

item.title: A Study in Dust and Stone, Session 4: Prophecy
item.description: Session 4 of the scenario “A study in Dust and Stone” for Call of Cthulhu 7th ed, where a dream becomes a prophecy.

item.title: A Study in Dust and Stone, Session 3: Gumbo and Books
item.description: Session 3 of the scenario “A study in Dust and Stone” for Call of Cthulhu 7th ed, where Lorenzo and Remy get to know each other over spicy gumbo.

item.title: A Study in Dust and Stone, Session 2: Dreams and Visions
item.description: Session 2 of the scenario “A study in Dust and Stone” for Call of Cthulhu 7th ed, where Lorenzo receives a warning.

item.title: A Study in Dust and Stone, Session 1: Scenario setup
item.description: Session 1 of the scenario “A study in Dust and Stone” for Call of Cthulhu 7th ed, where Lorenzo faces a mystery from his past.

item.title: A Study in Dust and Stone, Session 0/bis: Support Character creation
item.description: Session 0 of the scenario “A study in Dust and Stone” for Call of Cthulhu 7th ed., where we meet Remy “Red” Fontenot, bootlegger form New Orleans.

item.title: A Study in Dust and Stone, Session 0: Main Character creation
item.description: Session 0 of the scenario “A study in Dust and Stone” for Call of Cthulhu 7th ed., where we meet Loenzo Bartolini, Florentine antiquarian.

item.title: Vestigial Memories, Debriefing
item.description: Final debriefing for the “Vestigial memories” scenario

item.title: Vestigial Memories, Session 17: The Sea Wall Docks
item.description: Session 17 of the scenario “Vestigial Memories” for the Blade Runner RPG, where the final reckoning with Vestige is at hand.

item.title: Vestigial Memories, Session 16: LAPD
item.description: Session 16 of the scenario “Vestigial Memories” for the Blade Runner RPG, where Locke finally pieces together the whole mess.

item.title: Vestigial Memories, Session 15: The Snake Pit
item.description: Session 15 of the scenario “Vestigial Memories” for the Blade Runner RPG, where Locke’s enemies are closing in.

item.title: Vestigial Memories, Interlude: Locke's Apartment
item.description: Interlude of the scenario “Vestigial Memories” for the Blade Runner RPG, where an unexpected encounter outside of Locke’s apartment turns into a dangerous situation.

item.title: Vestigial Memories, Session 14: Holden's Office
item.description: Session 14 of the scenario “Vestigial Memories” for the Blade Runner RPG, where Locke must report back to Holden without revealing too much.

item.title: Vestigial Memories, Session 13: UCLA
item.description: Session 13 of the scenario “Vestigial Memories” for the Blade Runner RPG, where Locke finds a way to alter Vestige’s data at the cost of some of his own pride.

item.title: Vestigial Memories, Session 12: Dante's Lair
item.description: Session 12 of the scenario “Vestigial Memories” for the Blade Runner RPG, where Locke relies on an unreliable CI to alter Vestige’s data.

item.title: Vestigial Memories, Session 11: Hawker's Circle
item.description: Session 11 of the scenario “Vestigial Memories” for the Blade Runner RPG, where Locke takes some time off that leads to an unexpected meeting.

item.title: Vestigial Memories, Session 10: Tsingtao
item.description: Session 10 of the scenario “Vestigial Memories” for the Blade Runner RPG, where Locke tracks down the bootleg replicant to Tsingtao corp.

item.title: Vestigial Memories, Interlude: The Snake Pit
item.description: Interlude for the scenario “Vestigial Memories” for the Blade Runner RPG, where while en route to the warehouse district, Locke receives a disturbing message from a CI.

item.title: Vestigial Memories, Session 9: Runciter's Zoological
item.description: Session 9 of the scenario “Vestigial Memories” for the Blade Runner RPG, where Locke tracks down the bootleg replicant to Runciter’s Zoological, a place he knows all too well.

item.title: Vestigial Memories, Session 8: Interrogation room
item.description: Session 8 of the scenario “Vestigial Memories” for the Blade Runner RPG, where it’s time for Locke to interrogate Zhao again. Does he have enough dirt on her to get the information he needs?

item.title: Vestigial Memories, Interlude: Locke's Apartment
item.description: Interlude of the scenario “Vestigial Memories” for the Blade Runner RPG, where an unexpected encounter outside of Locke’s apartment turns into a dangerous situation.

item.title: Vestigial Memories, Session 7: Down Time
item.description: Session 7 of the scenario “Vestigial Memories” for the Blade Runner RPG, where Locke enjoys some well deserved down time before interrogating Zhao again. But it does not go as planned.

item.title: Vestigial Memories, Session 6: LAPD Mainframe II
item.description: Session 6 of the scenario “Vestigial Memories” for the Blade Runner RPG, where Locke is back to the LAPD mainframe, looking for dirt on Zhao. He needs something to break her during the interrogation.

item.title: Vestigial Memories, Session 5: Holden's Office
item.description: Session 5 of the scenario “Vestigial Memories” for the Blade Runner RPG, where Locke reports to Deputy Chief Holden and finds out that something much more sinister than expected is going on.

item.title: Vestigial Memories, Session 4: The Fish Ladies
item.description: Session 4 of the scenario “Vestigial Memories” for the Blade Runner RPG, where Locke visits Animoid Row to verify the witness’ statements. This takes him to the Fish Ladies, a shop specialized in aquatic animoids.

item.title: Vestigial Memories, Session 3: The Witness
item.description: Session 3 of the scenario “Vestigial Memories” for the Blade Runner RPG, where Locke travels to the Red Lights district to interrogate the main witness. Is this a mistaken identity case or is there something worse going on?

item.title: Vestigial Memories, Session 2: LAPD Mainframe
item.description: Session 2 of the scenario “Vestigial Memories” for the Blade Runner RPG, where Locke digs out a cold case file from the LAPD mainframe, looking for leads on the murder of Rhea Lang.

item.title: Vestigial Memories, Session 1: Case briefing
item.description: Session 1 of the scenario “Vestigial Memories” for the Blade Runner RPG, where Locke’s downtime is cut short by Deputy Chief Holden that wants him on a new case.

item.title: Vestigial Memories, Session 0: Character creation
item.description: Session 0 of the scenario “Vestigial Memories” for the Blade Runner RPG, where we meet Nathaniel Locke, veteran cityspeaker for the LAPD Replicant Detection Unit.

item.title: About this site
item.description:
Lone Quest is a personal blog where I journal my solo TTRPG adventures.

I use several different systems, but I prefer SciFi and Horror settings (Call of Cthulhu, Delta Green, Imperium Maledictum, Mothership to name a few). I also love most Free League products (especially Blade Runner RPG). I find their systems hit the right spot between rule complexity and ease of play. Beware: you will find no D&D here. I’ve played enough of that in my life, now I need something else.

item.title: PARALLAX, Session 10: Hypergeometry
item.description: Session 10 of the campaign PARALLAX for Delta Green, where the team faces an unexpected unnatural danger

item.title: PARALLAX, Session 8: Hastur's shadow
item.description: Session 8 of the campaign PARALLAX for Delta Green, where the teams hits a dead end.

item.title: PARALLAX, Session 9: A friend in need
item.description: Session 9 of the campaign PARALLAX for Delta Green, where a friend faces danger.
